passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Advance reservations are no longer required or accepted.
This pass admits up to three (3) visitors at half-price admission.
You will receive a coupon that you can present to staff on the day of your visit.
source_phrases: Advance reservations are no longer required or accepted.
This pass admits up to three (3) visitors at half-price admission.
You will receive a coupon that you can present to staff on the day of your visit.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
source_phrases: This pass admits up to two (2) people at $10 each. Library Passes are not valid for performances, events, or films
You will receive an email from the Library that will act as your coupon.
You can purchase your tickets online at  https://my.icaboston.org/events , or over the phone at 617-478-3100, or in person on the day of your visit.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to four (4) adults at $5 each. Children under the age of 17 are always free.
You will be emailed a coupon code. Tickets MUST be purchased online at https://tnew.gardnermuseum.org/events .
source_phrases: This pass admits up to four (4) adults at $5 each. Children under the age of 17 are always free.
You will be emailed a coupon code. Tickets MUST be purchased online at https://tnew.gardnermuseum.org/events .

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows unlimited parking access at most Massachusetts State Parks for one vehicle.
You will need to pick up a physical pass from the Robbins Library on the same day you reserve it. This pass MUST be returned the day after your visit.
source_phrases: This pass allows unlimited parking access at most Massachusetts State Parks for one vehicle.
You will need to pick up a physical pass from the Robbins Library on the same day you reserve it. This pass MUST be returned the day after your visit.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
source_phrases: This pass admits up to two (2) adults and four (4) youths (ages 7–17) at $15 per person. Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven (7) years old.
You will receive a promo code, which you can redeem online when you are buying your tickets.
You can also redeem the promo code in person, but the Museum strongly recommends buying your tickets in advance.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to four (4) people at half-price admission to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children two years and younger are always admitted for free.
You will receive a promo code that you can present at admissions on the day of your visit.
This discount cannot be applied to online ticket purchases. To reserve tickets ahead of time, please contact the Museum at 617-723-2500
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to four (4) people at half-price admission to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children two years and younger are always admitted for free.
You will receive a promo code that you can present at admissions on the day of your visit.
This discount cannot be applied to online ticket purchases. To reserve tickets ahead of time, please contact the Museum at 617-723-2500

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to four (4) visitors at half-price admission.
You will receive a promo code that can be redeemed on the date of your visit. This code cannot be redeemed online.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to four (4) visitors at half-price admission.
You will receive a promo code that can be redeemed on the date of your visit. This code cannot be redeemed online.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to two (2) adults at $12 each.
You will receive a promo code that you can apply when purchasing tickets online.
Advance reservations are strongly encouraged.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to two (2) adults at $12 each.
You will receive a promo code that you can apply when purchasing tickets online.
Advance reservations are strongly encouraged.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child
This pass is a physical coupon pass that you can pick up at the Robbins Library, but not the Fox branch.
You will need to select a reservation date, but you can apply the coupon discount on any date that you decide to go.
source_phrases: Admits up to 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child
This pass is a physical coupon pass that you can pick up at the Robbins Library, but not the Fox branch.
You will need to select a reservation date, but you can apply the coupon discount on any date that you decide to go.
